name: ACHFC court 1
description: ACHFC court 1 is a place to play pickleball in Harrisburg, SD. There are 2 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Avera Human Performance Center
description: Avera Human Performance Center is a place to play pickleball in Sioux Falls, SD. There are 18 hard and concrete courts. 12 are outdoors and 6 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to lights, restrooms, and wheelchair accessibility.
fees: Fee required — Indoor court is $30 a month to play.

name: Center For Active Generations
description: Center For Active Generations is a place to play pickleball in Sioux Falls, SD. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: First Christian Reformed Church
description: First Christian Reformed Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sioux Falls, SD. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Gloria Dei Lutheran Church
description: Gloria Dei Lutheran Church is a place to play pickleball in Sioux Falls, SD. There are 3 indoor courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Greatlife Golf And Fitness At Woodlake
description: Come play pickleball at Greatlife Golf And Fitness At Woodlake in Sioux Falls, SD! There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, and lights. The courts cannot be reserved. A membership is required to play.
open_play_schedule: Up to 6 courts of play on MWF 0800-1100.  Play varies T/TH/Sat/Sun

name: Huether Family Match Pointe
description: Come play pickleball at Huether Family Match Pointe in Sioux Falls, SD! There are 8 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms. You can reserve the courts.
hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-10pm Friday 10am-8pm Saturday 8am-8pm Sunday 8am-8pm Summer Session Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-8pm Friday 9am-5pm Saturday/Sunday CLOSED We reserve the right to adjust hours based on booked courts. Court rental fees are $24/hour. The booking party is responsible for supplying the names of the players that will be playing. If no additional names are submitted for the court booking, the player reserving the court will be billed the full court fees.

name: Laurel Oak Park
description: Laurel Oak Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sioux Falls, SD. There are 5 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Menlo Park
description: Menlo Park is a place to play pickleball in Sioux Falls, SD. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Our Saviors Lutheran Church
description: Come play pickleball at Our Saviors Lutheran Church in Sioux Falls, SD! There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is private.

name: Peace Lutheran Church ELCA
description: This court is for members of the church only!  Donations are appreciated!

name: Remedy Pickleball Pub
description: Remedy Pickleball Pub is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sioux Falls, SD. There are 4 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and trainers or lessons. The courts are free. The courts can be reserved.

name: Riverdale Park
description: Riverdale Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sioux Falls, SD. There are 6 outdoor hard and concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility is wheelchair accessible. The courts are free.

name: Sanford Pentagon
description: Sanford Pentagon is a place to play pickleball in Sioux Falls, SD. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Sanford Wellness Center on Oxbow
description: Sanford Wellness Center on Oxbow is a place to play pickleball in Sioux Falls, SD. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to water, restrooms, and lights.

description: Terry Redlin Elementary School is a place to play pickleball in Sioux Falls, SD. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and lights.

name: The Country Club of Sioux Falls
description: Come play pickleball at The Country Club of Sioux Falls in Sioux Falls, SD! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons.

name: The Jar Pickleball Club
description: We are the state’s first and largest dedicated indoor pickleball club!  From your very first swing to chasing that perfect dink, The Jar is your place to play.  Our welcoming community and top-tier facility make it easy to improve your skills, meet new friends, and find your next challenge. From open play to leagues and clinics, we’ve built the ultimate pickleball destination.

name: Venom Event Center
description: Venom Event Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Tea, SD. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.
